# ckw-design

> ckw-design is Conner K. Ward's frontend design skill for Claude Code: direction, design system, and visual philosophy as a loadable skill.

## Install (Claude Code)
- Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add connerkward/ckw-skills`
- Install this plugin: `/plugin install ckw-design@connerkward`

## Links
- Canonical README: https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-design-skill
- Marketplace (all of Conner K. Ward's skills + MCP servers): https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-skills

## Optional
- Author: Conner K. Ward — https://github.com/connerkward
